question: Who was appointed as the new head of Petrobras in February 2021, replacing Roberto Castello Branco?
ground_truth: General Joaquim Silva e Luna was appointed by President Jair Bolsonaro to lead Petrobras.
event_desc: Stock prices of Petrobras fall 21%, as investors worry that the appointment of General Joaquim Silva e Luna as head of the company means that economic decisions will be made based on politics.
